about.title: About Kaza Verde
about.intro: Kaza Verde makes it easy to browse real estate listings across all Cape Verde islands. We aggregate, normalize, and quality-check property data from local brokers and developers.
about.howItWorksText: Property data is collected from trusted local brokers across Cape Verde, then normalized and quality-checked by the Africa Real Estate Index pipeline. Only listings that meet strict quality rules — verified prices, detailed descriptions, and multiple photos — are shown on Kaza Verde.
about.dataSourceText: All property data on Kaza Verde is provided by Africa Real Estate Index — an open data initiative that indexes real estate listings across 54 African markets. The data is updated daily through automated pipelines.
about.qualityText: We believe in discipline over volume. Fewer, high-quality listings are better than thousands of incomplete ones. Every listing on Kaza Verde has been validated for price accuracy, description completeness, and image quality.
about.forDevelopersText: Kaza Verde itself is built entirely on the Africa Real Estate Index API. Want to build your own property portal? Check out our developer page.

developers.title: Built with Africa Real Estate Index
developers.intro: Kaza Verde is a live showcase of what you can build with the Africa Real Estate Index API. Every listing, filter, and data point on this site comes directly from our normalized data layer.
developers.tryItSubtitle: See live data from the Africa Real Estate Index API
developers.feature1Text: Consistent schema across all 54 African markets. Prices, locations, and property details follow a unified format.
developers.feature2Text: Every listing passes golden rules — verified prices, minimum description length, and image requirements.
developers.feature3Text: Automated pipelines run daily to keep listings fresh and remove stale or dropped properties.
developers.feature4Text: Cape Verde is just one of 54 markets. The same API structure works for Kenya, Ghana, Nigeria, and more.
developers.getAccessText: Interested in building with Africa Real Estate Index data? Get in touch to request API access.

footer.tagline: Open real estate data for Africa
